headline: Will AON Beat Q1 Earnings Despite Weakness in Wealth Solutions?
summary: Aon plc gears up for Q1 2026 earnings with steady estimates and solid growth outlook, but mixed segment trends and rising costs may cloud results.

headline: Will AIG Beat Q1 Earnings Estimates on Solid Underwriting Income?
summary: American International heads into Q1 earnings with rising profit forecasts and strong insurance momentum, as improving margins and investment income set the stage.
